programme.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

programme.title: Azerbaijan F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: In Baku, Max Verstappen leads a mixed-up starting grid with Carlos Sainz and Liam Lawson in podium contention. Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri bid to come through the field. (21.09)

programme.title: Singapore F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Marina Bay Circuit for the 2025 Singapore Grand Prix. George Russell claims Mercedes' second pole of the season, with Max Verstappen starting in second. (05.10)

programme.title: US F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out for the United States Grand Prix. A growing threat in the title fight, Max Verstappen has pole from Lando Norris as championship leader Oscar Piastri starts in P6. (19.10)

programme.title: Mexico City F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out in Mexico City. Lando Norris aims to capitalise on a big opening in the title race as the Ferraris of Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton round out the top three. (26.10)

programme.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

programme.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

programme.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out in Qatar. As Lando Norris lines up in P2 a win away from the world championship, it's down to polesitter Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen to deny the Brit the title. (30.11)

programme.title: Abu Dhabi F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out for the title decider. Starting behind polesitter Max Verstappen, Lando Norris will become world champion with a podium. Oscar Piastri has it all to do from third. (07.12)

programme.desc: Full Heart, Empty Pool: Grampa and Homer accidentally invent a new sport while arguing in a drained pool. But trouble arrives when Big Avocado sponsors it.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa the Veterinarian: Lisa is inspired to become a vet and begins an internship at a local surgery. Marge gets a job as a crime scene cleaner but finds it traumatic.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Tan France, Caroline Quentin, Joel Dommett and Johanna Konta take on classic éclairs and puff pastry, and recreate their biggest fears in cake form.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch The Masked Dancer, Married at First Sight UK, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, Bad Sisters and This Is MY House.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch the Queen's funeral, The Masked Dancer, Frozen Planet II, Bad Sisters, The Grand Tour: A Scandi Flick and Secret Crush.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Winning Connections: It's the final, and the final three couples set about proving their connections - and disproving others' - to win the £50,000 prize.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twitch streamer Fi gets likes all day but struggles to make a connection in real life. Bondage-lover Elle is after a sophisticated silver fox who's dirty in the bedroom.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch The Masked Dancer, Married at First Sight UK, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, Bad Sisters and This Is MY House.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch the Queen's funeral, The Masked Dancer, Frozen Planet II, Bad Sisters, The Grand Tour: A Scandi Flick and Secret Crush.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homr: When Homer loses all the family's money with an unwise investment, he becomes a human guinea pig to earn some cash - and that's when he becomes extremely intelligent...

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Dungeons & Dragons, Anyone?: Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his friends in gym class. Erica decides that she wants to leave home to go to college.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Rush: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends. Murray's not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Smother's Day: Beverly's upset when Barry and Erica forget to buy her a Mother's Day present and make some last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Wight Wedding: Groom Liam wants a wedding day that celebrates his homeland, the Isle of Wight. Bride Kandi wants a more standard day. Will it be all-white or go all wrong?

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: Cheeky original clips featuring ducks going up an escalator, animal impressions, a few narrow escapes on a snowboard and rally driving. Plus: an energy drink house prank and a butcher rap.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Putting Down Roots: Dede's husband Jerry comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they know what to do with.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Stuck in a Moment: Haley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they'll never forget - if she can find the perfect time. Claire is mad when Phil borrows the Christmas tree.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Hot Potato Café: The Hot Potato Café in Philadelphia has never made a profit. When the chips are down, can Gordon help save the restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Flamangos: Gordon visits Flamangos in rural New Jersey, where mother and daughter Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways. But their restaurant is far from paradise.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Scrunchie Rule: Beverly nurses Coach Mellor back to health after a slip-up with rope-climbing equipment. Erica and her roommate begin to annoy each other.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Colors: Barry tries to break up Beverly's social group to get more of her attention. Adam attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Blasts from the Past: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before becoming grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mum, who has an interesting past.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Whanex?: While preparing a presentation for his students about future goals, Cam must contend with a bully at the school. Jay has technical trouble during a video conference.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Bazzini: Award-winning chef Paul runs Italian joint Bazzini in New Jersey, but didn't realise how difficult running a restaurant would be. Can Gordon turn it around?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Mojito: Gordon Ramsay visits a Cuban café in Brooklyn, where owners Marcelo and Kata fight over everything, driving away customers with their high-volume bickering.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Coral Palms (Part 1/3): Peralta and Holt adjust to their lives in the Witness Protection Programme while crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis is still at large.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Coral Palms (Part 2/3): Jimmy Figgis sees Peralta and Holt's video and comes looking for them. A new captain takes over the precinct, but is he up to the job?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons Spin-Off Showcase: Troy McClure hosts a vision of the future of The Simpsons, in which Chief Wiggum becomes private detective Wiggum, P.I.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson: Bart and Lisa enrol in military school, but Lisa finds it hard to fit in. Guest starring Willem Dafoe.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hersheypark: When Adam tells Beverly that he doesn't want her to chaperone the school trip to a theme park, she tries to manipulate him with 'guilt letters'.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Mister Knifey-Hands: Beverly's not happy when Jackie's parents let Adam watch A Nightmare on Elm Street. Erica hangs out at her old high school.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A Year of Birthdays: As the birth of Haley and Dylan's twins approaches, the family look back at how each of them celebrated their birthdays this past year.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: New Kids on the Block: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Fugitive (Part 1/2): When a prison van crashes, loads of convicts escape and the squad must track them down.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Fugitive (Part 2/2): Peralta must ask a surprising ally to help catch the only escaped prisoner who's still on the loose.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homr: When Homer loses all the family's money with an unwise investment, he becomes a human guinea pig to earn some cash - and that's when he becomes extremely intelligent...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Pokey Mom: Marge notices a prison inmate's artistic talent and helps him to get a job painting a mural at the school. But he clashes with Skinner. Michael Keaton guest stars.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Estranger Things: When Bart and Lisa lose interest in their only shared love, Marge worries they'll drift apart as they grow up. Cue a glimpse into the future.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Marge-ian Chronicles: When Lisa signs up to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, Marge's attempt to use reverse psychology to discourage her goes badly wrong.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: James Blunt, Alison Hammond, Alex Jones and Joe Sugg take on traybakes, a British staple and a biscuit scene of what they wanted to be when they grew up.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke. Part five of the franchise follows Sarah Connor in an alternate timeline to the previous movies, as she takes on Skynet.

programme.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty...
programme.desc: ...Bits: We celebrate our celibate daters and the pickers who entered the studio with their virginity very much intact, ready for a televisual awakening like no other.

programme.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty...
programme.desc: ...Bits: We celebrate Naked Attraction's biggest and best audacious, attention-grabbing characters, from 75-year-old bisexual Ian to Shaida, who was looking for the dad of her future kids.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Strictly, Corrie, Antiques Roadshow, Frozen Planet II, Kings of Pain, Help! My House Is Haunted, and ITV News on Kwasi Kwarteng's disastrous mini-budget.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Has 'ladies' man' Terry met his match with bisexual Larisha? And will Canadian Donato's transatlantic charms impress Londoner Kate?

programme.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty...
programme.desc: ...Bits: We celebrate our celibate daters and the pickers who entered the studio with their virginity very much intact, ready for a televisual awakening like no other.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Big Orange: Beverly and Lainey hatch a plan to destroy Barry's favourite shirt. Adam's distraught when Murray decides to tear down the family tree house.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Christmas...
programme.desc: ...in the Snow: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But 2000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring school, a spelling bee and ninjas.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Explosions in Motion: The teams build a Hollywood movie scene that will set off explosives in ultra-slow motion to create the ultimate action-packed moment.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Wight Wedding: Groom Liam wants a wedding day that celebrates his homeland, the Isle of Wight. Bride Kandi wants a more standard day. Will it be all-white or go all wrong?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One in the Spanish Sea: Carl aims to marry Rebecca on the Med but she has expectations for a high-class affair. Will Carl's plans make a splash and make Rebecca swoon with delight?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Moon Landing: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend, Valerie (guest star Minnie Driver), visits and is nothing like Claire remembered.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: My Funky Valentine: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little role play excursion. And Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Fears: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and of creepy crawlies get the best of him.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Returns: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have things improved?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Spanish Pavillion: Gordon Ramsay visits Spanish Pavillion, a family-run restaurant whose owners, brothers Michael and Jerry, spend more time struggling for power than working.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Classic American: Best pals Colleen and Naomi bought Classic American in New York together, but their inexperience is pushing their friendship to the edge. Can Gordon help?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Down City: Gordon Ramsay tries to save struggling restaurant Down City in Providence, Rhode Island. But tough-talking owner Abby refuses to take advice from anyone.

programme.title: Home Alone 3
programme.desc: (1997) Comedy sequel starring Alex D. Linz as a resourceful boy who's stranded at home with chickenpox when a top-secret military microchip comes his way. Can he keep it safe from crooks?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer the Vigilante: Homer sets up a chaotic vigilante group to combat one-man crime spree Molloy (guest star Sam Neill).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart Gets Famous: Thanks to his new catchphrase, 'I didn't do it', Bart becomes famous, getting his own TV series and releasing a range of merchandise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Apu: When Apu loses the Kwik-E-Mart, he moves in with the Simpsons. And then Homer joins him on a pilgrimage to the first ever Kwik-E-Mart, in the Himalayas.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey: Lisa decides Malibu Stacey dolls set a bad example to girls, so she pleads with their creator, Stacy Lovell (Kathleen Turner), to design an alternative.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Much Apu About Something: Apu loses his job when his shop is rebranded as a health food market aimed at a hip young crowd. Bart's latest prank has terrible consequences.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4: Professor Frink uses science to turn into a ladies' man. And medication makes Grampa and the Retirement Castle residents hallucinate.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Gal of Constant Sorrow: Bart and Lisa get to know a homeless folk singer. Homer's attempt at DIY traps the cat in the walls of the house, so he launches a rescue bid.

programme.desc: Lisa the Veterinarian: Lisa is inspired to become a vet and begins an internship at a local surgery. Marge gets a job as a crime scene cleaner but finds it traumatic.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

programme.title: Boss Level
programme.desc: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

programme.title: Proxima
programme.desc: (2019) Sci-fi drama starring Eva Green as an astronaut who gets the mission she's always dreamed of, but faces a tug-of-love between her personal and professional life.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Arizona Raiders
programme.desc: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

programme.title: Leave Her to Heaven
programme.desc: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

programme.title: The Son of Robin Hood
programme.desc: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: (1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

programme.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

programme.title: The Kid Detective
programme.desc: (2020) Dark Adam Brody comedy. Abe was a childhood detecting prodigy but is now a failing PI. But when a local boy is killed Abe gets the case. Things are looking up (for Abe, not the boy).

programme.title: Thief
programme.desc: (1971) Crime thriller starring Richard Crenna. A recently paroled thief must do one last job to pay off old debts. But can he get away with it and build a life with his new girlfriend?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire
programme.desc: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get his estranged wife to hire him as a housekeeper, so he can spend more time with his kids.

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

programme.title: The Witch: Part 2 - The Other One
programme.desc: (2022) Park Hoon-jung's blood-soaked sci-fi horror sequel starring Shin Si-ah as a super-powered lab experiment let loose on the world to terminate with extreme prejudice and some gusto.

programme.title: Lola
programme.desc: (2022) Lo-fi sci-fi. In 1940, two sisters invent a contraption that intercepts future broadcasts. But it inadvertently creates an alternate timeline in which the Nazis win the war. Oops.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Call of the Wild
programme.desc: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

programme.title: Monkey Business
programme.desc: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: (2022) Family comedy with Michael Peña. A young lad discovers that his slacker dad is a superhero. And before he's got used to the idea, he must foil a villain's plot to bring his dad down.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: The Frighteners
programme.desc: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.
